reviews.title: Acceptable

reviews.negatives: Cơ sở vật chất mới sơn lại, nhưng khá cũ, bẩn, quét vệ sinh ko sạch, mình ko ăn súc xích nhưng trong phòng vẫn còn vỏ súc xích, phòng bạn mình có gián, theo thời gian nhận phòng 14h nhưng do kẹt xe đến trễ, mình lùi đến 17h30 mà đến nơi vẫn phải chờ thêm 15p, phòng trông như vừa dọn xong, lại ko sạch, có phòng còn không có thảm chùi chân. Giường loại khá cũ, ngủ đau lưng. Tiện nghi duy nhất là sát biển, có thể đi bộ ra biển.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Khăn sạch và trắng
reviews.negatives: Rất cứng nhắc về việc checkin-out, sớm trước 5p cũng ko được. Giá cả ko rõ ràng, đồ ăn trong phòng cái nào tính cái nào ko cũng ko niêm yết luôn. Lúc trước thích haku vì có lược gỗ, bàn chải gỗ, dầu gội sữa tắm cũng rất thơm. Nay đổi hết sang đồ nhựa kém chất lượng. Nay đổi chủ - sẽ không quay lại.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: The window in the room was ajar, so the wind was hitting it, causing noise and making it impossible to sleep. When the hotel changed us to another room, there was sand on the bed, and the shower in the bathroom was rusty. The experience was quite poor.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.positives:
- Vị trí thuận tiện, hầm giữ xe máy rộng rãi.
- Nhân viên nói chuyện lịch sự.
- Giá tốt.
reviews.negatives:
- Phòng cách âm kém, 1 phòng cùng tầng đóng cửa cũng nghe được.
- Vòi sen ở trường không hoạt động, chỉ có vòi xả nước và vòi sen trên đầu là hoạt động. Đã báo nhân viên và họ nói để báo kỹ thuật nhưng tôi ở đây 3 ngày 2 đêm không ai lên kiểm tra.
- Khi nhận phòng đã thấy chai xà bông gội đầu không có xà bông, chai xà bông tắm thì còn ít.
- Thành giường (đầu giường) đóng nhiều bụi. Đệm hơi cứng.
- Có kẹp tóc trên bàn tivi.

reviews.title: Cheap hotel
reviews.text: The price is comparably cheap but the staff is not supportive and very limited to speak English. I left my key in the front deck. I return to ask the staff about the key. It was nightmare that I found it twice at the table. Finally I found the key myself in the reception where the staff sitting at. The location is not accessible if you are not bike rider. Very far way to convenient store.

reviews.title: Value for money however...
reviews.text: Booked for 1 night and extend another night. Hotel and our room are clean.  Location is less than 5 minutes walk to the beach.  Value for money. However, one thing to note, the hotel website stated 24 hr counter, but at around 0130am, my girlfriend and I were hungry and wanted to go out to buy something.  The hotel counter was closed, the lobby is dark and the hotel door is locked. There is a man sleeping in the lobby, we woke him up and asked him to unlock the door. He refused and claimed that all shops are closed after midnight. Didn't understand why he said that because there is a 24-hour convenience shop just 3 minutes away from the hotel. Even so, guests are here for holiday and I don't see why we should be restricted. If there are curfew implemented, the hotel should have brief the guest during check-in or clearly on the Agoda website.  There is no mini snack bar/food in the hotel room, my girlfriend is very upset and she has history of gastric.

reviews.title: Is the attitude of the 3-star hotel staff that bad?
reviews.text:
I checked in on July 21, 2025, at 2 PM. I arrived earlier and left my belongings at the hotel. When it was time to check in, I provided my ID to the male receptionist and asked when I could check in. Instead of answering that it would take 5-10 minutes, he spoke to me as if I was cutting in line: "I have to check in the guests who arrived before you first."

When it was my turn, the female staff member said my room wasn't ready yet even though it was check-in time and there was still no room available. The male staff member mentioned changing my room, but it would add another bed, making it two beds. I asked if I needed to go back to my old room or if I could stay for both nights, and he replied, “If you REALLY want to stay, I will help you with abc.” Does your service not need customers? Don't you learn how to communicate with customers? I pay but am treated disrespectfully.

The toilet glass door was quite dirty, but the room was okay and had good sound insulation.

On the check-out day, they didn't even refill the hot water bottle in the lobby.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Yen tĩnh

reviews.title: Good location, friendly staff but not very clean
reviews.text: Ive been with my friends 1 night in this hotel. We arrived at the hotel at 12:30pm but I saw check in hour at 14pm. But when I arrived at the hotel and i asked the receptionist can i check in soon or not. She was very friendly and let us get in our room very soon. The room is quite good like the pictures that I watched on Agoda. But the bedsheets ưere not very clean. I still saw some dust on those bedsheets. They gave us 5-6 towers including towers for body and face. But we only used 2 of them. On the next day, when i wanted to use the differernt one. I saw a lot of ants inside the towel :(((((. The shower also weak. The power of water from the shower is weak too. They also have the very good location just take 5mins waking to the beach and take 5min driving to Jesus's statue. I also found the place to dry my clothes on 6th floor. At the checkout hour, we couldnt check out at 12pm because we felt very tired after climbing the Jesus's statue. I asked the receptionist for check out late 1,5 hours. She said that I just need to pay 80000vnd for extra hours. But i saw a rule on the rules of the hotel. Customer needs to pay 70000vnd for 1 extra hour. But she just get from us only 80000vnd for 1,5 hours instead of 105000k. We're in the hotel on public holidays in Vietnam so that we have paid 733000 for 1 nights instead of 450000 like usual. I think this price quite good for us . We also had a great time in Vung Tau city

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives:
Tuy nhiên nếu check in trước giờ quy định thu thêm 30% của phòng, 14h là giờ quy định thì 13h nhận cũng bị charge thêm 30%, này là policy của ks thì cũng oke nhưng nếu ks có nói luôn với khách khi lúc khách hỏi về nhận check in trước thì sẽ ok hơn

Nhà tắm cũ và lỗ thoát nước chảy yếu....

reviews.text: Phòng ốc hơi nhỏ cho 4 người, tuy nhiên tiêu chí đặt ra là rẻ + gần nên rất phù hợp. Nhóm tính đi chơi cả ngày nên không care lắm. Tuy nhiên nếu bạn đến bằng xe hơi thì nên cân nhắc, khách sạn nằm trong hẻm đông du khách thường xuyên có nhiều xe du lịch loại to đậu chờ, đi lại hơi khó khăn, muốn đạu xe phải giành chỗ.

reviews.title: Stay Here but Beware
reviews.text: The staff is great in this hotel. The location of the Minh Nhan Hotel is good depending on what  you are wanting to be close to.  The tourist, backpacker and bus transportation trips offered by travel agencies, are there at this location so it is a handy place. Pickpockets are on the streets and anyone staying there should be aware of this. The water is not hot but lukewarm, so if you want a hot shower you might not get it, hot is iffy.

reviews.title: Average service
reviews.text:
When we arrived, the motel was good appearance, I mean looked nice. When we came into reception desk, we met the husband of owner. We showed him our reservation which are already paid via Agoda. The man and his son told us that they haven’t received any information about our booking and they were out of room...
We came immediately upset about that. However, a lady which is owner told us that let her arrange room for us.
Actually, we already paid for rooms, we were on trip 10 ppl.
She told us that she was so sorry about bad situation and she would arrange rooms for us when we came back after dinner. And she did very well, she gave us offer that she upgrade 2 of 4 into deluxe room without any extra fee. We would be ok with that. Because we only need rooms for ppl for one night.
Well, seem she is great on her solutikn. However, we will never come back to this because of people which are beling to the motel. The husband is old, but very aggresive.

reviews.title: Best $8 room
reviews.text: Clean and good room.  Little English spoken by staff. If you know Vung Tau or am not afraid to figure things out, great bargain.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời, mình và ny có rất nhiều kỉ niệm đẹp với nhau.
reviews.positives: Gần biển, tiện di chuyển

reviews.title: Good for family, quite cheap
reviews.text:
Conditioner is very dry, though still cold.
The room has 1 wall made of glass door so the sun shines in the early morning.
There is no drying space, forced to use a laundry service which is quite expensive.
Rice is delicious but a bit expensive.
Around you can walk up the mountain or go for a walk in the sea, quite close.

reviews.title: Giá tốt, phòng tiện nghi. Có dịp sẽ quay lại
reviews.positives:
Nhân viên lễ tân và buồng phòng lễ phép, hỗ trợ khách.
Phòng đúng như mô tả.
Tiện nghi, đầy đủ đồ dùng cá nhân.
Mỗi khách có 3 chiếc khăn trắng, mới, thơm, sạch sẽ.
reviews.negatives: Cách âm chưa tốt. Nghe rõ khách đi ngoài hành lang.

reviews.title: Great Beach Access
reviews.text: Few minutes walk to beach but not accessible to food. Room was cleaned daily. Decent place for comfortable rest away from the traffic.

reviews.title: Hợp lý. Có cơ hội sẽ ghé lại
reviews.positives: Đầy đủ vật dụng cần thiết, được free nước suối. Staff rất dễ thương, thân thiện. Khách sạn có hỗ trợ giữ đồ sau khi checkout.
reviews.negatives: Cách âm chưa được tốt lắm. Đèn của phòng mình yếu hơn phòng bạn mình

reviews.title: clean , good
reviews.text: i will come back

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Thoải mái
reviews.negatives: Ban công nên dọn vệ sinh lại. Nên có móc phơi đồ khi đi tắm về

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Friendly staff provided enthusiastic support, when I entered I noticed the room had a light smell, the TV had some flickering issues which made it uncomfortable to watch and strained my eyes, but everything else was fine, so it's worth a try.

reviews.title: +1 chỗ nghỉ tôi tin iu, sẽ quay lạiiii🫶
reviews.positives:
_ Phòng có view tượng Chúa, nằm trong hẻm có 2 đường đi ra các khu bán đồ ăn, cửa hàng tiện lợi và RA BIỂN luôn, chỉ 100-150m. 
_ Phòng sạch và không có mùi lạ, nội thất mới, tivi to, có tủ lạnh mini, mền êm.
_ Thích nhất cái tủ gỗ rất to và sạch, có nhiều khăn (dù không dùng nhưng mình check không bị mùi)
_ Có sảnh ngồi đợi nhận phòng
_ Có thang máy (đông người sẽ đợi 3-5p)
_ Kiểm phòng sau check-out nhanh gọn
_ Có sảnh ngồi uống cafe hoặc tối chill BBQ, vòi rửa và bồn rửa ngoài sân cho khách dính cát
_ Đợt mình đặt không biết có promo không nhưng giá rất hời so với chất lượng phòng tháng du lịch, uống nước trong phòng free, trừ đồ ăn. Lúc đầu tưởng scam🥲
_ Có 1 bàn trang điểm và 1 khu gương rửa mặt (đi nhóm nữ đỡ quánh nhau)
_ Có shop cho thuê đồ "Sò" khá đẹp (không có size L), chỗ cho thuê xe điện, quán nước nhỏ, tiệm ăn sáng, tối có bán đồ lưu niệm (có bị dí nha), ăn vặt, quá trời tạp hóa,... cách đó 10-50m
_ Nhà vệ sinh có khăn giấyyyy (10đ)
_ Nhân viên rất dễ thương. Nhất là bạn Thủy (hi vọng đúng tên) hỗ trợ nhiệt tình.
_ Tiếp tân avail 24/24, nhờ giữ thẻ phòng đi chơi khuya vẫn yên tâm.
_ Hẻm xe hơi nên vô tư nha, đón tận cửa. Đi xe 6-7 chỗ ra gốc Vú Sữa/bánh bông lan cô gì đó (?) chưa tới 40k, chắc chỉ 1,5km (nóa đõa😉)
reviews.negatives:
_ Không biết có phòng view biển như quảng cáo không, phòng mình ở view núi cũng oke.
_ Gối nằm êm nhưng ngủ 1 đêm ai cũng đau cổ do khá cao.
_ Vòi sen nóng lạnh chảy đều nhưng hơi yếu
_ Máy lạnh yếu không mát lắm dù 16 độ cả ngày (tụi mình không có feedback liền để sửa), phòng giường đôi là chỉ khá lạnh 1 giường ở gần, nên giường kế bên bị nóng ngủ khỏi đắp mền
_ Hẻm toàn villa/homestay, khi giờ cao điểm khá đông người, nhiều xe hơi, có cả karaoke nhưng không quá ồn. Vẫn ổn phết vì ồn ào có 30p -1 tiếng, sau đó vắng người rồi.

reviews.title: To be able to live
reviews.text:
Staff (10/5 enthusiastic)  
The hotel sidewalk is dirty (3/5)  
The room is not very new, there are many ants (4/5 I have a super view)  
Amenities (5/5 there is a coffee counter, ice cream cabinet, hot and cold water dispenser, rare for a 1-star hotel)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Thủ tục nhanh, gọn, tiện lợi ưu tiên quyền lợi khách hàng.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Sát bãi say

Vị trí của khách sạn hơi bất tiện 1 xíu. Nhưng nói chung mọi thứ đều ổn.

reviews.title: Good For a Cheap Night or Two in Vung Tau
reviews.text:
Friendly hotel a short walk from seafront. It was quiet even on Saturday night when the rest of the town is manic.

Good bed and sheets, towels, free water etc. Room cleaned and things replaced as needed. All clean and a comfortable stay that I extended to a 2nd night.

WiFi was rubbish till I reset the router on my floor a couple of times, good after that.

Safe basement parking for bikes.

My room was at the end of the building in a sort of glass tower, most rooms not like this. The glass was very dirty so no decent view. Only opening window was broken and couldn't be safely opened, so cleaning windows not possible. Good curtains covers windows for night or privacy.  Odd design, but I liked it, would be much better with cleaned windows.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời, dịch vụ cơ sở vật chất rất tốt, phục vụ xuất sắc!
reviews.positives: Rất tốt
reviews.negatives: Không có

reviews.title: A good location
reviews.text: Just a bit walk to the beach. Nice & clean room. The reception girl informed us they can't provide the cooking service for us, we have to buy the seafood & cook ourselves. But when we arrived and met the mistress, she can cook, and told us next time just call her directly and she will give us more exact info.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng khá ok, nhân viên ở đây rất nhiệt tình và chu đáo nhé

reviews.title: A comfortable place in an good location at unbelievably low price
reviews.text: I was very skeptical about this hotel because the price seemed too low for the location but based on reviews I decided to stay here. On check in found the place just few minutes walk from the back beach and the room was too good for the price. The only negative was that , the bed was bit hard . I will recommend this place to a budget traveller for a clean room very close to the beach.

reviews.title: Tầm giá khá tốt so với mặt bằng chung
reviews.text:
Mới trả phòng trưa qua ( 10/6)  , chỉ có duy nhất 1 vấn đề không vừa lòng đó là trên lịch hẹn giờ nhận và trả phòng là 14h . Nhưng khi mình 13h30 xuống trả phòng thì yêu cầu thanh toán thêm tiền , sau khi đưa tiền mình có nói rõ lại 1 lần nữa thì bạn tiếp tân mới hoàn lại tiền chi mình .  
Ngoài vấn đề đó ra thì cũng khá hài lòng với mọi thứ , nhân viên nhiệt tình,  phòng sạch sẽ , đi ra biển cũng gần ,phòng khá đủ các tiện nghi ( bình đun siêu tốc , tủ lạnh , ... ) .
Sẽ ghé lại vào lần sau  .

reviews.title: KS Ok, Nvien is enthusiastic.
reviews.text: The room is generally not too disappointing since it is quite cheap. The alley leading to the hotel is easy to find and it's close to the back beach, which is okay. The room is clean, but the toilet has some calcium buildup and the pillow is a bit uncomfortable for the neck.

reviews.title: 10 đỉm
reviews.positives: Phòng sạch đẹp, nhân viên vui vẻ, nhiệt tình, dễ thương, mình sẽ ghé lại

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: The book above is quite reasonable, the rooms overall are okay, I like the mountain view window which is very relaxing. However, the room is a bit old, the side window doesn’t close tightly so it can be very noisy when the wind blows. The bathroom is covered in calcium deposits so it looks old, I hope it can be fixed.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách rất đẹp,  gần biển,  nhân viên thân thiện ,hỗ trợ nhiệt tình. Điểm 10 cho khách sạn nè

reviews.title: 4 Star
reviews.text: The hotel staff are very nice. In terms of the room decor, I would rate it 3.5 stars. In the room I stayed in, the exhaust fan in the toilet did not work, and the TV could not access channels or connect to the internet. There was only one elevator, and it was a bit slow, so you would have to wait a long time on busy days. Overall, the view from the room was very good for the price. I would rate it 4 stars. If the hotel improves these issues, it would be fantastic.

reviews.title: Mình cùng với gia đình đã có 1 kì nghỉ rất vui vẻ. Lần sau có dịp mình nhất định sẽ quay lại đây🤭

reviews.title: Excelente hotel near the beach.
reviews.text:
The hotel is only 3 minutes from the big beach and the beautiful walk way.
The front desk staff are very friendly and helpful. 
My room was upgraded with windows facing the mountain.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nápomocná manažerka 🏨. Zařídila vše co jsme chtěli a bylo toho opravdu hodně. Umí dobře anglicky, my ale ne. Ochotná a trpělivá s překladem od google.

reviews.title: Good location
reviews.text: There is a motorbike rental link, centrally located near the beach, about 2-3 minutes by motorbike to the back beach, but it's a bit far to walk, maybe around 15-20 minutes. The amenities in the room are okay, but the TV in my room had static, so I couldn't watch anything. It's fine for mainly going out and sleeping. The staff doesn't seem very enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Don't have serviced breakfast in the morning. The hotel near by the sea about five minutes for walk. The room almost clear but somewhere be not take care in time.
reviews.negatives: The road don't comfortable for walk. Some items in room not work and empty.

reviews.title: Fine room with convenient location
reviews.text: 5 minute walk from the beach, staff are nice. Room is a bit old but staff can help to clear it out

reviews.title: Friendly hotel. Secure motorcycle parking.
reviews.positives: Friendly hotel. Secure motorcycle parking

reviews.title: 2 days 1 night at Minh Nhân Hotel
reviews.text:
Advantages: Reasonable prices, meal service as requested, delicious cooking, cleanliness. Cheap breakfast buffet, 50k for 3 dishes + drinks; friendly and enthusiastic owner and staff. The hotel is close to the beach, about 200m away.  
Disadvantages: Following G-map is only suitable for motorbikes or cars with 5 seats or less, I drove a pickup truck so I couldn't go into the alley.

reviews.title: Great Stay
reviews.text: Recommend and I have booked extra nights

The hotel is nice and clean
The best thing is cheap price. Facilities are OK. Good view.
Toilet is not ok because it smells nasty, I hope it will be better next time
My room is hot in the afternoon, but it's ok
I will book again if I come to Vung Tau

reviews.title: Near the sea
reviews.text: The room is a bit small, but the price is reasonable, it has all the amenities, super strong wifi, close to the beach, near the Ca Ong square, in a crowded area, with a cheerful atmosphere.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 1 night on the holiday with a room that has a window for only 260k on Agoda, the room is quite clean and has enough amenities, -1 point for not having shower soap ready, overall quite good.

reviews.title: Sẽ quay trở lại!
reviews.text: Mình và mẹ đi du lịch 3 ngày 2 đêm ở Haku. Mẹ mình rất hài lòng với phòng. Ga giường và gối thơm mùi nước xả, chứng tỏ khách sạn có chăm chút. Từ khách sạn ra biển bãi sau cũng rất gần. Sẽ quay lại trong tương lai.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phòng ổn tốt, nhưng vòi sen trong nhà tắm bị rò rỉ, hệ thống hút mùi chưa tốt lắm

reviews.title: Reasonable compared to the price, convenient location.
reviews.text: Affordable price compared to the services. Rooms are fully equipped. The location is close to the beach, making it convenient to walk to the swimming area as well as other tourist spots. Right at the beginning of the alley, there is a Circle K and GS25. Motorcycle rentals are also available.

reviews.title: Room with 2 single beds, just affordable, saving for a short trip.
reviews.text: Young, dynamic staff, very enthusiastic in supporting guests. The hotel has a very convenient breakfast buffet ❤️ My family has 2 small children, and the staff frequently checked in, guided us, with no discrimination against group guests. Thank you to the staff and the hotel. My family will return if we have the opportunity to come back to Vung Tau.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Good experience. Affordable and the staff are friendly

reviews.title: Close to the beach, nice host, cheap price.
reviews.text: I received a room with a dome, it has a view but on the second floor, so I can only see the view of the houses. There's a Circle K and GS25 at the end of the street. The room is quite clean, I like the scent of lemongrass essential oil in the room. Even after staying for 3 days, the smell still lingers. There is a basement for parking that feels quite safe. The TV doesn't connect to wifi. The furniture in the room is old but still usable. Overall, it's great considering the price. If you're looking for a place to relax that isn't too luxurious and is budget-friendly, I think this hotel will be wonderful for you.

reviews.title: Very relaxing
reviews.text: Enjoyed my stay here in September 2022. I returned for another week shortly after I had left.

reviews.title: Will Return!
reviews.text: Best room rate with great location and new facilities! Distance to the beach. The staffs let me check-in 5 hours earlier than policy. The room doesn’t come with good soundproof , however it’s acceptable compared to the price. Will definitely rebook here for my next trip to Vung Tau!

reviews.title: 3day2night
reviews.text:

reviews.title: Good, Clean, Friendly
reviews.text: Nice hotel close to the beach.

reviews.title: Clean and comfortable
reviews.text: Everything is good, room is clean, staffs are helpful. Walking distance to the beach.

reviews.title: Cheap, good location, recommendable!
reviews.text: Totally worth paying for it with a cheap price, walk to the beach in few minutes although it's in the small alley. Well organized, neat, clean, acceptable view (a corner of sea through the high buildings surrounding, full of morning sunlight when waking up, you cannot expect more from this place with this no-more-cheaper price). The room is exactly the same with the pics. The thing is that the tap & hot water is a little weak (5th floor), not very comfortable while showering. There's a refrigerator without drinks, no minibar or snacks, an electric kettle without tea nor instant noodle, no hairdryer. However, totally acceptable, you cannot expect 3* standard with a motel price, it's surely better than any other hotel at the same price. Will get back for the next time!

reviews.title: Good and simple hotel
reviews.text: Needed to find a simple hotel real quick and found this one.

reviews.title: Totally satisfied
reviews.text: Good staff, perfect room, convenient location

reviews.title: Amazing experience
reviews.text:
Amazing experience.
- About the room space: Spacious and comfortable, with white painted walls.
- About the amenities: Fully equipped, with a big TV, water, tea, coffee, and free instant noodles on the table; there will be a charge for items in the fridge. The bathroom has enough face towels, bath towels, shampoo, body lotion, toothbrushes, toothpaste,... all in pairs. The air conditioning is excellent, and there is a kettle and hairdryer. The shower water has both hot and cold options.
- About the location: The hotel is located in an alley, but close to the beach; it takes about 7 minutes to walk there. The hotel faces the mountains, and you can see the lighthouse from there.
I must say this is my first time booking this hotel, but the experience was truly wonderful, and if I have the chance to visit again, I will book again.

reviews.title: In the short term, it's okay.
reviews.text: I went for a day trip but booked a full day and night. They even supported me with an early check-in by an hour. That's great. All the amenities are complete and clean, but they are just a bit old. The hotel would be better with some upgrades and maintenance. As for the price, it's very reasonable. I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Good for resting
reviews.text:
Vị trí tốt: nằm giữa biển và một công viên có hồ nước. Khá nhiều hàng ăn uống và cửa hàng tiện lợi 24/24 quanh khu vực chỉ vài phút đi bộ. Phòng sạch, giường êm, không cách âm mấy nhưng giá ở tầm ***/đêm/2 người thì chấp nhận được.
Great location! It’s situated between the beach and a lovely park with ponds. There are plenty of restaurants, bars, cafés, and convenience stores open 24/7 — basically, everything you need is within a 5-minute walk. The room is clean, the bed is decent, and while it’s not soundproof, the price is very reasonable — about *** per night for two people.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is easy to find, the parking lot is spacious, and the rooms are clean, bright, and large. The staff is enthusiastic, lovely, and very supportive; there is a seating area in the lobby, and free drinking water in the room (with staff assistance). Security is okay; around 10-11 PM, the parking lot will be closed, but there are staff on duty, just call them, and someone will come to open the door for you to park your car. However, on the night I stayed, the air conditioning had an issue; it felt like it was off even when set to 16-17 degrees, and it got even hotter at night. The hotel should pay attention to regularly checking the facilities to ensure quality and improve the experience for guests.

reviews.title: Travel
reviews.text: Clean and comfortable, enthusiastic staff, I will come back if I get the chance.

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: The location is in an alley but you can walk straight to the beach, the hotel is fully equipped, and the owner is friendly and enthusiastic.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is located in an alley but cars can easily come in and out. It is very convenient to get from the hotel to Thuy Van beach. Mr. Ba, the manager, is very friendly and hospitable. Receptionist Huyen is extremely cute, and the two room service staff are also lovely. Mr. Ba enthusiastically recommends many delicious and affordable restaurants in Vung Tau. Overall, I feel that everyone at the hotel treats each other like family. In general, the hotel is very good for the price range. I will definitely return here many more times. Wishing the hotel more and more guests!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: viêw đẹp sạch xịn

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good place for short days trip. Reasonable price. Facilities is compatible with the money. But the staffs are not very focus cuz I can see they had lot of works. After all, highly recommended

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: tuyệt vời

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Nice area close to the beach and to the Jesus statue.

reviews.title: Good room with reasonable price
reviews.text: This place is near the beach and convenient store; therefore, we can access to all kind of entertainment here. Besides, the facilities here are good too.

reviews.title: Great location
reviews.text: Near the beach, 24h convenient store. The beds are not so comfortable :)

reviews.title: Must stay
reviews.text: Nice room, clean and convinience for Vung Tau trip

reviews.title: Good Deal and Friendly Staff
reviews.text:
I wanted a place that was good value, basic, clean and centrally located. Minh Nhan was all of the above and more.  It's a 10 minute walk to the beach and closs to the Jesus statue tour site. Food is nearby, mostly local food but ok. Staff are friendly. Manager Mr Son speaks good English and is knowledgeable while his boss also helps out. Its a friendly, small business type of environment. 

Bed sheets and towels are changed daily and clean. Room was big, bright, clean and bed was very comfortable.  Perhaps bring your own soap and shampoo because the hotel's ones which come in sachets, I found it hard to open. 
Other than that, I definitely recommmend this place.

reviews.title: Nice get away
reviews.text:
Conveniently located a short walk from the beach. Lots of restaurants and coffee shops. Insanely busy on the weekends with large groups, but basically empty during the weekdays!
Hot water was unreliable and we couldn't get wifi in our room. Good, cold aircon. The listing says there is a pool but there isn't one. 
The pros outweighed the cons especially for price and location. 
I'd stay there again!!

reviews.title: clean room great for the value
reviews.text: a few minutes walk from the beach. the room is clean and the bed is comfortable.

reviews.title: Great Place
reviews.text:
We stayed 4 nights, couldn't extend, no more rooms available.
Really nice room and bathroom. Changing towels every day, new drinking water and Toiletries.  Mattress was in room 502 a bit worn and the chromeparts in the bathroom needs more attention.
I highly recommend this place.

reviews.title: Resort location
reviews.text: A reasonable resort location, whether you go alone, with a partner, or with a small family, is joyfully affordable and worth experiencing.

reviews.title: nice hotel  ...  in the last few weeks have stayed here 4 times
reviews.text: My favourite room is the Superior Double ... I have booked 3 times in the last month.  I have also stayed in a twin room .. it is kind snug for 2 people, but it has two big beds and is adequate.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean. The service is really good. The staff is very friendly and enthusiastic. The bedding, towels, and linens are very clean and fragrant.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel has clean rooms, very friendly staff, is close to the beach and GS25, Circle K, just a few steps away from the beach.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the staff is enthusiastic and lovely, the service is very good, it's close to the beach and convenience stores, just a few steps to reach the beach.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.text: I have stayed at this hotel twice recently and will go back there in a few days.  The rooms are nice, the location is good and the staff are friendly

reviews.title: Very nice hotel
reviews.text: I have never stayed  in this part of Vung Tau before and found it to be delightful. The hotel is set back about a 5 minute walk from the beach and is nestled within maze of little streets.  It feels very safe.  Lots of nearby places for snacks, drinks, meals, laundry.

reviews.title: I booked a second night
reviews.text: I have stayed in Vung Tau many times, but this is the first time I have stayed in this part of Vung Tau.  The hotel is set back from the beach ... about 2 minutes walk. The location is very quiet with a maze of little streets with plenty of shops for food an drink. It feel safe day and night time  The hotel itself is very comfortable. The staff are friendly and they speak English well enough to communicate with English speaking people.

reviews.title: Good choice
reviews.text: Comfortable and clean room. Good bathroom and shower with lots of hot water. Helpful staff.

reviews.title: Trip to Vung Tau
reviews.text: When arriving to check in. The staff is enthusiastic, the room is clean, and fully equipped. But the hairdryer is of somewhat poor quality.

reviews.title: Amazing overall
reviews.text: It's close to everything. Great view, it's also quiet. It's also clean.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is conveniently located, the rooms are clean, and the staff is professional and friendly.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is beautiful, clean, and has amenities that match (or can be better than) the price. Especially, the staff members are very, very, very polite and lovely. I will definitely return here on my next trip to Vung Tau!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Beautiful room, clean, friendly staff, will come back next time😍

reviews.title: Friendly host, close to the beach, clean room.
reviews.text: The room is clean, walking to the beach for a swim, this place is nice for swimming just like the flagpole square beach. The staff is very friendly and helpful. I think on regular days, driving by car will be smooth, but during holidays it can get a bit crowded, yet still manageable, and there’s parking available in the basement or next to the hotel. I will come back when I have the chance.

reviews.title: The hotel is very clean.
reviews.text: The friendly host and cheerful staff. I will come to the hotel on other holidays. The hotel is very close to the beach and can be reached by walking.

reviews.title: Rat Tốt
reviews.text: Tuyệt vời nhất là chú ba và bé nam lễ tân

reviews.title: Satisfied
reviews.text: Budget hotel, even though I went during the Tet holiday, the prices did not increase. The price is very reasonable compared to the quality. The room I stayed in did not have a window, but it was quite clean. The downside is that the shower water feels a bit slippery and seems slightly yellow. The hotel needs to check the plumbing system.

reviews.title: Phòng hợp giá tiền
reviews.text: Lễ tân nhiệt tình hỗ trợ, nhưng tiếc là chỗ đậu xe hơi hẹp

reviews.title: Very worth experiencing.
reviews.text: The room is spacious, cleanliness is good, the price set on the app is cheap, and it's very close to the beach when walking out the back. The hotel owner is very enthusiastic in guiding many fun places and great dining options. The downside is that the wifi is somewhat weak, and sound insulation is poor, so outside movement and conversations can be heard clearly.

reviews.title: Wonderful place to stay for families with young children.
reviews.text:
Fully equipped and clean facilities.  
A quiet place very close to the back beach.  
Located near the city center.  
The bed is very comfortable and spacious.  
Complete bathroom amenities with super cheap room rates.  
Will come back to this hotel next time.

reviews.title: The hotel is very good.
reviews.text: This was my first time booking on the app and I got an incredibly good price; I couldn’t believe I was able to book at such a low price during the holiday. I had to call the hotel to confirm, and they said they received the booking, but we went in with little hope because of the low price. However, the hotel turned out to be quite nice, the staff was friendly, the double room was comfortable, the rooms were clean, and there was an outdoor lounge for guests to eat their food. It was also close to the beach, absolutely wonderful. I have recommended it to my family, and every time we go back to Vung Tau, we will visit this hotel.

reviews.title: Warm and cozy like at home.
reviews.text:
All the hotel staff are like family to me; they are always cheerful, care about the guests, and are eager to help with meals (even when I brought my own food, they still provided a complete set of dishes and chairs without service charge). They assisted me in calling a taxi during peak weekend times when I couldn't get a Grab.

Thank you Uncle Ba, Sister Luong, and the young friends, as well as the older ladies.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The room is spacious, clean, with a sufficiently large bed, and fully equipped with amenities such as warm water, spring water, hairdryer... Friendly staff. There is parking space next to the side. Completely worth the price. 2 minutes drive to the beach, about a 5-10 minute walk. The only downside is that the TV has a bit of static and few channels.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Quiet place, clean and value for money.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Quiet and good location, close to the beach.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Phong sach she, thoang may, gan bien. Rat tốt sẽ ghé nhiều lần nữa

reviews.title: EVERYTHING IS REALLY FINE, OKAY?
reviews.text: I went with a group of 9 adults and 1 child, the room was clean and fully equipped with amenities, the hotel owner was very friendly and hospitable, the receptionist was also cheerful and welcoming, the beach was nearby, and there were comfortable places to eat and drink. In general, I will definitely visit again when I go to VT in the future.

reviews.title: Affordable prices, close to the beach, convenient for travel.
reviews.text: I went during the Tet holiday, the hotel had a slight price increase but I think it's reasonable and not too different from the usual price. The location is very close to the beach, just a 3-minute walk (across the street) to the back beach. Right in front of the alley, there is a Circle K - lots of convenience stores and eateries. The staff is friendly and enthusiastic. The room is relatively clean. It has a hairdryer, kettle, and refrigerator. There is a light breakfast buffet. Trustworthy, I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great staff! Nice place!

reviews.title: Clean and affordable price
reviews.text: Excellent location, it was clean, the price is good, very close to the sea/beach.  There was one drawback, that the water in the shower was not quite hot, but I think this is not in all rooms.  However, I really recommend the hotel for its price on Agoda.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The staff here are very enthusiastic, and they even showed us the quickest way to get back. As for the rooms, they are relatively clean, although the mattress sinks down a bit and the floor is a little squeaky. However, if you’re not too particular or mostly renting to store your things and go out to have fun, I think this is still a suitable place for relaxation, I recommend it to everyone.

reviews.title: Great stay
reviews.text:
Fantastic staff, who were always happy and helpful.
Functional hotel with lots of sunny windows, an outside terrace to sit-on and removed from the main road so nice and peaceful

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: My fav place, fav ppl

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Great place to stay
reviews.text: clean, walking distance to beach

reviews.title: Very good for  budget  traveler
reviews.text: Close to Thuy Van Beach, and a lot restaurent  , 30 meters to @K  24 hours open

reviews.title: Good for stay
reviews.text: Excellent

reviews.title: Number 1 budget hotel, and I’ve stayed in many.
reviews.text: Great hotel , lift , fridge,clean , friendly staff and a great location

reviews.title: Great value for money
reviews.text: very clean, nice little room with modern furniture, highly recommended for the budget conscious.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Will  be comback

reviews.title: Excellent hotel very helpful staff.  highly recommended
reviews.text: Excellent place to stay. 2 minutes to the ocean.  A $2 taxi to the center.  Excellent room.  Very very helpful front desk.

reviews.title: GREAT TOTALLY
reviews.text: I had a great time to stay here in generally: facilities, location and staff services ... Should some back here next time in Bangkok.

reviews.title: Khach san gan bien. Gia hop ly.
reviews.text:
Nhan vien than thien. 
May lanh hoat dong tot.

reviews.title: loin de la ville
reviews.text: proche de la plage mais loin du centre ville location de scoter indispensable pour se ballader en toute liberte

reviews.title: Avis à mettre à jour
reviews.text:
J’ai pris cette chambre pour me changer des hostels, la chambre reste à bas prix   donc je ne m’attends pas à quelque chose de luxueux. 

En revanche au vue de la notation je m’attendais tout de même à un minimum.

Malheureusement ne comptez pas sur de l’eau chaude, ni de pression, l’eau ne coule pas de la pomme de douche uniquement du robinet. 
Le lavabo était parsemé de cheveux et de résidus dont je ne souhaite connaître l’origine. J’avais aussi pour mon petit plaisir pris une chambre avec vue panoramique, en revanche vu la propreté des vitres on ne voyait pas grand-chose (sans exagérer) 

La literie n’est pas folichonne non plus mais la chambre rest “correct” pour le prix de la nuit, mais n’ayez pas d’attente 

Café / thé gratuit dans la chambre

reviews.title: Voyage tourisme
reviews.text:
Bon hôtel, propre, services ok , 150 m plage et les restos autour. 
La seule chose que je reproche à l'hôtel c'est de l'eau chaude, on a seulement le matin et tiède....

reviews.title: hotel agreable
reviews.text:
hotel pas loin de la plage on y va a pied
les restaurants sont a cote
location de cyclo pour la balade
et voiture pour hcm
je recommande

reviews.title: Trés bon sejour !
reviews.text: Hotel très  propre , personnel et direction très accueillant , 300 mètre de la plage  , 1 km du centre , location scooter tarif très intéressant , peu y repasser un séjour sans problème , je vous le conseil !!

reviews.title: Tres bien
reviews.text: Super hotel bien propre pres de la.mer. Personnel discret mais présent. Menage fait tous les jours sans avoir besoin de le demander. Ideal.pour passer.un séjour a vung tau.

reviews.title: Hôtel très bien situé
reviews.text: Tre6satisfait de ce séjour dans cet hôtel. peronnels accueillants et sympathiques, chambre très propre et grande. Je le recommande .

reviews.title: Parfait
reviews.text:
Tout était parfait .
Quartier calme , à 2 minutes de la plage et d’un Circle K.
Chambre propre .
Personnel très sympathique .
Je recommande sans problème

reviews.title: ブンタウ
reviews.text: おそらくコロナ禍休業しておりあちこちが壊れており修理されてない模様、写真とのギャップが激しいホテル。

reviews.title: Great value for money, If it is a weekday price.
reviews.text:
バックビーチに近く、町の中心からは、少し離れている。
窓が大きく、明るい部屋で、結構良かった。
平日の安い宿泊費であれば、満足度は高い。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 良い

reviews.title: 部屋は、清潔。
reviews.text: オートロックで、バックビーチに近い。キリスト象も、歩ける距離。

reviews.title: 部屋は広く大きな窓
reviews.text:
５０１号室に４泊しました。西側の角部屋、窓が２つ有り上の階なので気持ちが良かった。ビーチはすぐ近くにあります。近くにはレストランもイッパイあります。
建国記念日にあたり４連休だったので、泊まり客が多いせいか、夜シャワーのお湯がぬるかった。お昼間は利用者が少ないので熱いお湯でました。たまたまオーナーがホーチミンから来ていて、いろいろお話を伺えました。
私は別に毎日掃除はしてもらわなくても気にしないが、希望すればしてもらえます。
ただ掃除をしてもらえないと、水の補給をしてくれないのでレセプションでもらつていた。
このホテルは部屋の予約状況によってアフダウンするので注意。

reviews.title: 安くて良いよ
reviews.text:
場所は､繁華街から若干離れていますが、海と観光場所が徒歩圏内にあるので、良い場所かと思います。
スタッフの方もとても親切です。

reviews.title: 静か
reviews.text:
大通りから少し入ったところにあるので静かです。
また利用するかもしれません。

reviews.title: 그냥 잠만 자기 좋은곳 그이상 그이하도 아님
reviews.text:
침대시트가 누렇게 얼룩덜룩 했고 삐걱거림 시내랑은 다소 거리가 있고 붕따우 예수상은 가까움 
호텔 찾기도 어려움 근처에 편의점은 많아서 좋은듯 그치만 위생상 별로 비추임 ㅇㅇ

reviews.title: 손님 없어서 그런지 직원 일 안함
reviews.text: 방은 가격대비 괜찮음. 혼자 와서 묵기에는 적당.

reviews.title: 가성비짱
reviews.text:
해변 길가 약간 안쪽에 있어서 도보로 해변가기엔 큰어려움 없고
일단 방 컨디션에 비해 가격이 좋았음
단점은 그주위에 아무것도 없다는거 ^^
하루 이틀 묵는다면 추천

reviews.title: 적당합니다!!
reviews.text: 저렴한 가격, 친절한 직원들, 적당한 위치

reviews.title: 해안가 근처
reviews.text:
적당한 가격에 해안가 근처라 움직이기도 좋음,
가격 대비 괜찮은 곳이라 생각이 듦

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: 저렴한가격 호텔도 깔끈하니 좋아요.

reviews.title: 여행
reviews.text: 엄청 좋은 곳이다. 담에 가면 꼭 요서 다시 예약한다.

reviews.title: 가성비 갑
reviews.text: 직원 친절. 바닷가에서 가까움.  방 매우 좋음. 아고다 평점보고 선택했었는데 값어치 충분히 함

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: 價格最划算 面積也挺大離海邊挺便捷的6 7分鐘就走到了 離耶穌基督雕像也不遠20min能走到 住得環境與圖片一致 推荐

reviews.title: Nhận phòng trễ lễ tân ko giải quyết cho khách, ko tôn trọng khách hàng
reviews.text: Vòi xen bị hư đợi mãi mới lên sửa, lễ tân nói chuyện mất lịch sự đặc biệt bạn tóc vàng, khách phải đợi hơn 3h mới nhận được phòng

reviews.title: Lễ tân thiếu tôn trọng khách, nhận phòng trễ hơn 3h
reviews.text: Lễ tân ở đây nói chuyện rất mất lịch sự đặc biệt bạn nhuộm tóc, khách nhận phòng trễ ko giải quyết hợp lý cho khách, tới 3h mới nhận được phòng, làm ăn mất uy tín quá
